originalTitle: Reinforcement learning research with Joseph Suarez
title: Refactoring Curriculum Algorithm and Running 2048 Sweeps on Puffer 5
summary: Refactored the curriculum algorithm code, cleaning up messy pointer accesses and defensive programming. Fixed RNG and seeding issues, reduced code size from 1000 to ~500 lines, and launched initial sweeps on 2048 to validate the new state set curriculum.
